result.stderr:
funseaai-unity-mcp
Bridges stdio MCP traffic to a local Unity Editor HTTP MCP server.

Options:
  --url <http://127.0.0.1:8765/>   Unity MCP HTTP endpoint.
  --timeout-seconds <120>           HTTP timeout per request.
  --version                         Print the proxy version.
  --help                            Show this help.

Environment:
  FUNSEAAI_UNITY_MCP_URL
  FUNSEAAI_UNITY_MCP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
  GAMEBOOOM_MCP_URL
